---
title: Pull Request
description: Required change rationale, validation evidence, learner impact, and safety review for calculator lab contributions.
---

## What Changed

Describe the focused change and affected files or exercises.

## Why

Explain the problem, intended outcome, and any prior Issue or Discussion.

## Validation

List commands and results. Include screenshots or other evidence for user-facing
changes. Explain any check that could not run.

## Learner Impact

Describe changes to prerequisites, difficulty, sequence, timing, expected
results, accessibility, or facilitator guidance.

## Security, Cost, And Cleanup

Describe effects on secrets, permissions, dependencies, GitHub Actions, Azure
resources, Docker resources, external services, costs, and cleanup steps. Write
`None` when there is no effect.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and unrelated work is excluded.
- [ ] Documentation and tests reflect changed behavior.
- [ ] Public content contains no secrets, personal data, confidential data, or vulnerability details.
- [ ] Relevant validation passed or unavailable checks are explained.
- [ ] I reviewed and take responsibility for all submitted content.
- [ ] I will follow the repository Code of Conduct.
